title: Dukettes Vanilla Halberds
description:
A resource pack inspired by halberds I made for a datapack. 
With this resourcepack, you will be able to rename any of the swords into halberds <3
body: # Dukettes CIT Halberds ## Halberds for any occasion Based on the surprisingly good feedback I got for the multitool-dependent version of the pack, I had decided to update my Optifine version of the same resourcepack. With this resourcepack, you gain a halberd simply by renaming your sword to include the word "halberd", which isn't case sensitive. Not only that, but this resourcepack is made in a way that allows you to write anything before, or after, the word halberd, which lets you have the ultimate customization experience! ### CIT dependent CIT has usually been connected to optifine, and this resourcepack has been built with optifine in mind, however, if you're on fabric and want to use it, without the use of optifabric, then there are mods that makes both optifine CIT work, just as well as mcpatcher. #### Compatibility *The 1.20.1 version is also suitable to versions all the way back to 1.8,* >*and maybe even 1.7, though I can't assure it 100%* ### Swords before you rename, or without the resourcepack on. ![Swords before the renaming/without the resourcepack on](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/RkcWmn5b/images/2a1768fb80e07bdd9d9e7ea261a9eb81ed946095.png) ### Swords after you have the resourcepack on, and rename them halberd. ![Halberds](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/RkcWmn5b/images/0c4e034c8a739c506cf165b678f398d7a3d59d21.png) **There are some more pictures in the gallery if you need to see more before downloading** [Click on this link if you'd rather implement them into your game as a multitool](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dukette-halberds) >(Note that the textures are slightly different, to better fit the names of multitools) If you want to comment about any issues, or if you have any suggestions then you can write in the comments on the [PlanetMinecraft post](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/vanilla-halberds-optifine-1-17-x/) or, if you feel like it, you could always subscribe or even pm me on [my account](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/dukette/) --- **You can find my other stuff here**
